description:
The Checkbox component is a UIX element used with a Button component to provide a toggling state whenever the button is pressed.

}}

fields.State: The current state of thie check box.
fields.TargetState: The Bool field to drive with the state of the checkbox.
fields.CheckVisual: The Bool field controlling visibility of the visual to display when the checkbox is in the checked state.

usage: Checkboxes are great for settings and options in your designs.
